THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHARON, NADAV DBA AVIS GLASS SOLTANIZAD, JAVAD DBA AVIS GLASS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KOSS, BRIAN ROBERT PARTIES HAVING NOTIFIED THIS COURT IF THEIR SETTLEMENT OF THIS MATTER, INCLUDING THEIR AGREE- MENT THAT THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT JUDGMENT BE VACATED, IT IS HERBY ORDERED THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT BE VACATED.
